translations.en: a frightened little man who never looks you in the eye.
translations.zh: 一個膽小的矮個子男子，從不與人對視。

translations.en: He looks up from his mug of ale.
"Oh, it's you. Hello."
"Hello."
"Yes?" he asks, looking like he expects to be beaten any minute.
translations.zh: 「是？」他問道，神情像是隨時準備挨打。

translations.en: "Yes? Oh, it's you." He almost looked you in the eyes then.
translations.zh: 「是？哦，是汝。」他差點就與汝對視了。

translations.en: "What do you want from me?"
He looks around at the ground and mumbles "Arbeth."
translations.zh: 他低頭四下張望，嘟囔道：「阿伯斯。」

translations.en: "Arbeth," he repeats quietly.
"Well," he says so quietly you have to lean close to hear, "I make @wool into @thread."
translations.zh: 「嗯，」他說話如此輕聲，汝不得不靠近才能聽清，「在下把@羊毛紡成@線。」

translations.en: "Yes," he says, wringing his hands together.
"I'm not a weaver, $G, just a spinner. Talk to @Thindle."
translations.zh: 「在下不是織布匠，$G，只是個紡線匠，去找@辛德爾吧。」

translations.en: "He lives here in Paws and is a fine weaver."
"What? Oh, yes, I could spin spidersilk into thread. Do you want me to?"
translations.zh: 「什麼？哦，是的，在下能把蜘蛛絲紡成線，汝要在下做嗎？」

translations.en: "He is nice to me." he stops wringing his hands and seems to relax momentarily.
translations.zh: 「他對在下很好。」他停止絞扭雙手，似乎暫時放鬆了一些。

translations.en: "He's much too @loud." He looks up suddenly and his face goes ashen.
translations.zh: 「他實在太@吵了。」他突然抬頭，臉色頓時變得慘白。

translations.en: "But...I mean...maybe not too loud."
translations.zh: 「但是……在下是說……也許沒那麼吵。」

translations.en: He whips his head around as if he's looking for someplace to hide.
translations.zh: 他急忙轉頭，像是在找地方躲藏。

translations.en: "She's alright, I guess."
"He's alright, I guess."
A smile crosses his face. "I like her. She brought me cookies once."
translations.zh: 他臉上浮現一絲微笑。「在下喜歡她，她曾給在下帶過餅乾。」

translations.en: "Bye," he whispers.
He twists his shoulders around and holds his palms up.
translations.zh: 他轉動著肩膀，攤開雙掌。

translations.en: "Not now, $G," he says timidly. "My shop is closed."
translations.zh: 「現在不行，$G，」他怯懦地說，「在下的店鋪關門了。」

translations.en: "Oh. Sorry," he mumbles.
"Which of you?"
"Oh. Sorry," he mumbles.
"'Tis a most difficult job, $Y. It'll cost thee 20 gold!"
translations.zh: 「這是非常困難的活計，$Y，需要20金！」

translations.en: "Still interested?"
"Oh. Sorry," he mumbles.
"Good, good!" He seems much brighter and happier now.
translations.zh: 「好好！」他此刻看起來精神煥發，愉快多了。

translations.en: "Oh, but I'll need twoscore bits of spidersilk to do it!"
translations.zh: 「哦，但在下需要四十片蜘蛛絲才能做！」

translations.en: "Come back when thou hast 40 pieces of spidersilk and I'll make thy thread then."
translations.zh: 「待汝湊齊40片蜘蛛絲再來，在下那時便為汝紡線。」

translations.en: "Oh, but you'll not be able to carry it, $Y!"
"Come back when thy load is lighter and I'll make thy thread then."
translations.zh: 「待汝的行囊輕些再來，在下那時便為汝紡線。」

translations.en: "You haven't the gold."
Arbeth takes $Y's gold and silk and starts spinning...
translations.zh: 阿伯斯取過$Y的金幣和絲，開始紡紗……

translations.en: Soon he has finished a spool of fine silk thread!
translations.zh: 不久他便完成了一捲精美的絲線！

translations.en: "There it is, $Y, my finest work! A true pleasure!"
translations.zh: 「$Y，完成了，這是在下最好的作品！真乃一大樂事！」

translations.en: Arbeth hands $Y the spool of silk.
translations.zh: 阿伯斯將絲線捲軸遞給$Y。

translations.en: "You'll have to find a @weaver, of course..."
"Which of you?"
"Will you pay 3 gold for a spool of thread?"
"You look pretty full to me."
After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the thread.
"You haven't the gold."
"None of you has any wool," he mutters.
"Which of you?"
"Will you take 6 gold for that wool?"
He hands $Y 6 gold pieces and takes the bale of wool.
translations.zh: 他遞給$Y 6枚金幣，取走一捆羊毛。

translations.en: "But you don't have any wool!"

translator_notes: 103 Arbeth: 鴉爪鎮極度膽小的紡線匠，不敢對視，說話輕若細語。能將蜘蛛絲紡成絲線（任務關鍵NPC）。與提默關係好，怕莫圖德。
